article_meta.title: A copy of the Ten Commandments is posted along with other historical documents in a hallway of the Georgia Capitol on June 20, 2024, in Atlanta

reasoning: Response wrapped the array in markdown code fences, violating the required JSON-only format. Content-wise: no attribution violations, but one questionable flag and a misapplied label; also missed a clearer author-level framing about motive.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged only author paraphrase, not quoted text.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: The second item (Bias by Omission) is speculative and not a clear bias instance; first item is defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed the author’s un-attributed motive framing ('to incorporate religion in public schools') which could be Slant/Opinion-as-fact.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: First item correctly labeled as Omission of Source Attribution; second item mislabeled as Bias by Omission where a different type (e.g., Slant/Unsubstantiated Claims) would fit better.
